# Starboard

> GitHub stars organizer with semantic search — sub-product of CodeVetter for repo intelligence.

## Product

- [Home](https://starboard.codevetter.com/): Product
- [CodeVetter](https://codevetter.com/): Parent product


## Product surfaces

- [Discover](https://starboard.codevetter.com/discover)
- [Explore](https://starboard.codevetter.com/explore)
- [Tools catalog](https://starboard.codevetter.com/tools)
- [Stack builder](https://starboard.codevetter.com/stack-builder)
- [Projects](https://starboard.codevetter.com/projects)
- [Radar](https://starboard.codevetter.com/radar)

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://starboard.codevetter.com/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://starboard.codevetter.com/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://starboard.codevetter.com/llms.txt)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase
